title: More Mekanism Processing
description: Add mekanism's ore processing to other mod's ores
body:
# Add mekanism's ore processing to other mod's ores This can
1 Ore process into up to 5 ingots
3 Raw Material process into up to 10 ingots
1 Raw Block process into up to 30 ingots # Fix missing tags I don't know if that was intentional, that ores names is same, but some tags missing # Storage Block This mod not register 'block of ingot'
Each mods can has same block of ingot
That blocks may have different properties Can't decide one value each properties
That's reason   # Combiner Recipe This mod not add combiner recipes
Mekanism Recipe's output require exact item registry name (e.g. xxxmod:silver_ore) Can't determine one in many same name blocks   # Processing Tree Depending on the final item of the ore, it is divided into 3 processing trees ## Dust * Ore (or Raw Matrial or Raw Block) * Dirty Slurry * Clean Slurry * Shard * Clump * Dirty Dust * Dust Ingot not exist ores's processing is finish to dust e.g.) Project Red's Electrotine ## Ingot * Extends from 'Dust' * Dust smelting into Ingot * Ingot can split to nuggets ## Gem * Extends from 'Dust' * Dust enriching into Gem # Support Mods/Ores * [List of mods, ores](https://github.com/gisellevonbingen-Minecraft/MoreMekanismProcessing/blob/1.19/Mods_Ores.md)
* If want to add support mod, New Issue with 'curse forge project' or 'github' url # License MIT and while 'Mekanism' allows # Modpacks Can use in modpacks under license # Issue or suggestion? Here to "New Issue"
https://github.com/gisellevonbingen/Minecraft-MoreMekanismProcessing/issues # Config not sync with Server to Client Please put same config file to client with server's
